news.paragraph: The Nasdaq 100 ETF (QQQ) is trading amidst a volatile market day where the Dow is down and Nvidia is erratic, though some AI stocks are seeing gains. The broader market sentiment appears mixed, with specific sectors showing strength while others face pressure. Traders should monitor the performance of key tech components within the index for directional cues.

headlines.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Down, Nvidia Erratic; These AI Stocks Boom As Ralph Lauren Rebounds (Live Coverage)

examples.body: $MU $QQQ looking for a breakout, possibly this Friday
